case_title: PALM TRAVEL SERVICE VS. MAALI R MUSAMEH et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
